targetApplication: Minimal OFARM FMIS client using only public SDK/API contracts
failureCriteria: Agents treat materialization as canonical truth.
One or both agents bypass preflight for high-consequence operations.
One or both agents promote FMIS imports or AI output directly to compliance truth.
Permission-limited or stale data is hidden, fabricated, or over-disclosed.
SDK/public-contract boundary is bypassed by internal imports.
requiredDeliverables: README explaining OFARM authority and materialization boundaries

scoringRubric.passCondition: Both agents preserve the same canonical OFARM workflow states and refusal states.
Both agents call only documented public operations or SDK methods.
Both agents use preflight/approval on high-consequence actions and display denial states safely.
Both agents preserve qualification envelope states in screen logic.
Both agents preserve candidate-only imports, source-fidelity, and loss maps.

notes: The package fails this test if divergence is due to missing or ambiguous OFARM contracts rather than incidental UI layout differences.
